creator: mark@linus.demon.co.uk
text:
I've experienced a system hang (no console response) a couple
	of times now, and I think the circumstances were the same.  Both
	times I interrupted tcpdump after taking the interface (ppp0) down.
	I'm running under X.

Fix: 

Sorry, I haven't investigated.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Bring up ppp0; start tcpdump; bring down ppp0; ^C tcpdump.  The
	system freezes immediately.
